title: oberonia iridifolia
intro: Oberonia iridifolia, also known as the Oberonia orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oberonia iridifolia are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Oberonia iridifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, from colds and flu to digestive problems.
